lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: That merchant gave you extra herbs without asking for payment.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: He wanted to seem charitable. People are transparent when motivated.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Or maybe he recognized something good in you. Saw it reflected.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: You're stubborn as stone, Alon. But I'll... consider it.
